    • createContents

    • folding

      public void folding()
      Description copied from interface: IElementComposite
      Collapse the edit composite, i.e. hide the children of this composite.
      Specified by:
      folding in interface IElementComposite

    • setExpand

      public void setExpand(boolean isExpanded, boolean recursive)
      Description copied from interface: IElementComposite
      Set the expand status of the element composite.
      Specified by:
      setExpand in interface IElementComposite
      Parameters:
      isExpanded - true if the element composite is going to expand, false otherwise.
      recursive - true to propagate expand state recursively

      Description copied from interface: IElementComposite

      public void elementAdded(IRodinElement element)

      Parameters:
      element - a Rodin element.

    • dispose

      public void dispose()
      Description copied from interface: IElementComposite
      Dispose this element composite. This is done recursively, i.e. the children is disposed first, then this parent itself.
      Specified by:
      dispose in interface IElementComposite

    • getElement

      public IRodinElement getElement()
      Description copied from interface: IElementComposite
      Return the element associated with this element composite.
      Specified by:
      getElement in interface IElementComposite
      Returns:
      the associated Rodin element.

    • isExpanded

      public boolean isExpanded()
      Description copied from interface: IElementComposite
      Check to see if the element composite is expanded or collapsed.
      Specified by:
      isExpanded in interface IElementComposite
      Returns:
      true if the composite is expanded. Return false if it is collapsed.

    • childrenChanged

      public void childrenChanged(IRodinElement element, IElementType<?> childrenType)
      Description copied from interface: IElementComposite
      Refresh the edit composite recursively when there are some changes for children of input type of the input element.
      Specified by:
      childrenChanged in interface IElementComposite
      Parameters:
      element - a Rodin element.
      childrenType - a Rodin element type.

    • getComposite

      public org.eclipse.swt.widgets.Composite getComposite()
      Description copied from interface: IElementComposite
      Get the main composite widget.
      Specified by:
      getComposite in interface IElementComposite
      Returns:
      the composite widget of this element composite.

    • select

      public boolean select(IRodinElement element, boolean selected)
      Description copied from interface: IElementComposite
      Select / Deselect an Rodin element.
      Specified by:
      select in interface IElementComposite
      Parameters:
      element - a Rodin element
      selected - true if the element is selected. false if the element is de-selected.
      Returns:
      true if the operation is successful, i.e. if the element is indeed selected or de-selected accordingly to the input selectedvalue. Return false otherwise.

    • recursiveExpand

      public void recursiveExpand(IRodinElement element)
      Description copied from interface: IElementComposite
      Recursively expand the editing composite for the input element
      Specified by:
      recursiveExpand in interface IElementComposite
      Parameters:
      element - a Rodin element.

    • edit

      public void edit(IInternalElement element, IAttributeType attributeType, int charStart, int charEnd)
      Description copied from interface: IElementComposite
      Edit the element for a certain attribute given the attributeType, the start and end positions.
      Specified by:
      edit in interface IElementComposite
      Parameters:
      element - an internal element.
      attributeType - an attribute type IAttributeType.
      charStart - start position.
      charEnd - end position.

    • refresh

      public void refresh(IRodinElement element, Set<IAttributeType> set)
      Description copied from interface: IElementComposite
      Refresh the information display in the composite if there are some changes for attribute of input type within the input element.
      Specified by:
      refresh in interface IElementComposite
      Parameters:
      element - a Rodin element.
      set - a set of attribute types, must not be null. When this is an empty set, the operation is the same as IElementComposite.refresh(IRodinElement)

      protected IRodinElement getChildTowards(IRodinElement element)
